codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses all four blocking findings from the prior member-invitations review: Spreadsheet cells are viewer-read-only, Hierarchy drag + inline edit are disabled for viewers, Kanban card drag is disabled for viewers, and OrgChart drag-to-reparent is disabled for viewers while card inline edit is disabled via InlineEditableField.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture docs are stale for Outlet context shape after viewer-guard work; docs still say only filteredEmployees is passed, but views now depend on isViewer as well.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:88 says Outlet passes only filteredEmployees; implementation uses Outlet context with isViewer in SpreadsheetView, HierarchyView, KanbanView, and OrgChartView.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Architecture docs are still stale for org membership model introduced by member-invitations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:40,53 still describe Organization.memberIds-only relationships and do not document role metadata/invitation model now used by authorization and UI role guards.

summary: Pass. Reviewed the fix-viewer-guards transcript skeleton and both relevant diffs (member-invitations and fix-viewer-guards). The fix adequately resolves the prior blocking viewer-guard failures across Spreadsheet, Hierarchy, Kanban, and OrgChart interactions. No blocking or non-blocking code defects found in this fix.
